div.style: color: rgb(14, 31, 24) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Broker signs up with just
email + phone number

div.style: color: rgb(14, 31, 24) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Brokly detects the provider
MX lookup on the email

div.style: color: rgb(14, 31, 24) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
One tap — Continue with Google
OAuth consent · read-only mail

div.style: color: rgb(14, 31, 24) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
One tap — Continue with Microsoft
Graph Mail.Read consent

div.style: color: rgb(14, 31, 24) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(14, 31, 24) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Instant backfill — scan 90 days
of portal emails
'We found 23 leads in your inbox'

div.style: color: rgb(14, 31, 24) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Live watch on new mail
Gmail push via Pub/Sub
2-min poll as fallback

div.style: color: rgb(14, 31, 24) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Server-side sender filter
only MB · 99acres · Housing · OLX
personal mail never read

div.style: color: rgb(14, 31, 24) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(14, 31, 24) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Set alias as notification email
inside portal settings

div.style: color: rgb(14, 31, 24) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Gmail auto-forward rule
Brokly auto-confirms the
verification code it receives

div.style: color: rgb(14, 31, 24) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Inbound mail webhook
Cloudflare Email Routing

div.style: color: rgb(14, 31, 24) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:

Gemini parse → dedupe →
match / auto-create card → score

div.style: color: rgb(14, 31, 24) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Lead card + WhatsApp alert to broker
+ first-touch to buyer
